contests.title: Delayed Image Upload Processing
contests.description: Civitans! We're battling some pretty bad server lag and our scanners haven't been doing their job, and we know it's frustrating! Our team is on it, working hard to get things running smoothly again, but you may experience some inconsistent behavior in the meantime. Thanks for your patience!
